api-gateway/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Extract Swagger UI and API documentation paths into a constant array for cleaner configuration.
Extract aggregate API paths into a constant array for cleaner configuration.
Enable CORS with default settings in the security filter chain.
Allow unauthenticated access to Swagger UI and documentation endpoints.
Allow unauthenticated access to aggregate API endpoints.
Allow unauthenticated access to the fallback endpoint.
Require authentication for requests to the categories API.
Require authentication for requests to the users API.
Require authentication for requests to the carts API.
Require authentication for requests to the orders API.
Require authentication for requests to the payments API.
Require authentication for requests to the subscriptions API.
Allow unauthenticated access to Spring Boot Actuator endpoints.
Change default security policy to require authentication for any request not explicitly permitted.
Move CSRF disabling configuration into the fluent builder chain for consistency.
Remove unused imports and comments related to Java security and configuration practices.
Added Resilience4j circuit breaker filters to existing developer and application service routes to handle downstream failures.
Added a new gateway route for the category service pointing to localhost:8080.
Added a new gateway route for the user service pointing to localhost:8082.
Added a new gateway route for the cart service pointing to localhost:8083.
Added a new gateway route for the order service pointing to localhost:8084.
Added a new gateway route for the payment service pointing to localhost:8085.
Added a new gateway route for the subscription service pointing to localhost:8086.
Added a new gateway route for the subscription plan service pointing to localhost:8086.
Added routes to aggregate Swagger/OpenAPI documentation from all microservices by rewriting paths to /v3/api-docs.
Added a specific fallback endpoint route to return a 503 Service Unavailable response when circuit breakers trip.
Renamed existing route bean methods to include 'Api' suffix for consistency with new routes.
Standardized log messages to include an [API] prefix for better traceability.

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Replace deprecated @RequestMapping with specific @GetMapping annotation for better clarity and modern Spring practices.
Add CircuitBreaker, Retry, and Observation annotations to enable resilience4j and micrometer monitoring for the client calls.
Implement default fallback methods to handle failures gracefully when the developer service is unavailable.
app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.human_impl: default boolean isDeveloperByIdFallback(String id, Throwable throwable) { ... return false; }

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Add a new endpoint to check developer existence by Keycloak ID, including resilience annotations and fallback.
Rename the FeignClient name from 'developer-service' to 'developerClient' to align with the new resilience configuration names.
Remove commented-out bean definition for AuthenticationSuccessEvent listener to clean up the class.
app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.human_impl: Deleted the block comment containing the commented-out @Bean method for ApplicationListener<AuthenticationSuccessEvent>.

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Remove inline explanatory comments from import statements for cleaner code.
app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.human_impl: Removed comments like '// Import SLF4J Logger' and '// For CSRF' from the import section.

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Extract Swagger and Actuator UI paths into a constant array for reuse in security configuration.
app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.human_impl: Added private static final String[] SWAGGER_UI_PATHS containing paths for swagger-ui, api-docs, swagger-resources, webjars, and actuator.

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Refine the custom security filter to suppress warning logs for Swagger/Actuator paths when no auth token is present.
app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.human_impl: Modified the addFilterBefore lambda to check if the request URI matches SWAGGER_UI_PATHS before logging a warning for missing Bearer tokens.

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Update HTTP authorization rules to explicitly permit Swagger, Actuator, and specific API paths while requiring authentication for others.
Added Jackson imports to support manual JSON deserialization of request parts.
Added Spring and Java NIO imports to support serving static image resources.
Added Spring Security imports to support role-based authorization and JWT principal extraction.
Injected the application upload directory path from configuration properties.
Injected ObjectMapper to handle manual JSON parsing of multipart form data.
Changed create endpoint to accept raw JSON strings for request and metadata instead of auto-bound objects, requiring manual parsing.
app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.human_impl:
@RequestPart("request") String requestJson,
@RequestPart(value = "metadata", required = false) String metadataJson

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Restricted the create endpoint to users with the 'developer' role.
Implemented try-catch block to manually parse JSON strings into ApplicationRequest and ScreenshotRequest list.
app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.human_impl:
request = objectMapper.readValue(requestJson, ApplicationRequest.class);
metadata = objectMapper.readValue(metadataJson, new TypeReference<List<ScreenshotRequest>>() {});

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Changed update endpoint to accept raw JSON strings for request and metadata instead of auto-bound objects.
app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.human_impl:
@RequestPart("request") String requestJson,
@RequestPart(value = "metadata", required = false) String metadataJson

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Implemented try-catch block to manually parse JSON strings into UpdateApplicationRequest and ScreenshotRequest list.
app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.human_impl:
request = objectMapper.readValue(requestJson, UpdateApplicationRequest.class);
metadata = objectMapper.readValue(metadataJson, new TypeReference<List<ScreenshotRequest>>() {});

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Added a new endpoint to retrieve applications specific to the authenticated developer using JWT subject.
Added a new endpoint to serve thumbnail and screenshot images from the local file system.
Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions.
Add a required monetization type field to the request DTO to support new business logic for pricing models.
Add a list of subscription plans to the request DTO to support recurring revenue models.
Remove screenshot data from the creation request DTO, likely moving it to a separate upload endpoint or service.
Remove rating fields from the creation request DTO as these are typically calculated/aggregated by the system, not provided by the creator.
Remove audit timestamps from the creation request DTO as these should be managed by the persistence layer (e.g., @CreatedDate).
Added monetization type and associated subscription plan IDs to the application response DTO.
app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.human_impl: Added MonetizationType monetizationType and List<String> associatedSubscriptionPlanIds fields.

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Changed the developer ID field from Long to String to align with updated data model or API contract.
app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.human_impl: Changed Long developerId to String developerId.

app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.general_idea: Removed inline comments and design notes from the record definition to clean up the code.
app-service/src/main/java/com/appverse/a.human_impl: Removed comments like '// Include ID in responses' and '// Or potentially: CategoryResponse category'.
